audit_items.proof_trace: The property's assertion 'forall free(p) in acl_remove_ip' has an empty domain: the function contains zero explicit free() or memory-deallocation calls. All local state is stack-allocated (struct cork_ip addr), cork_ip_init performs pure stack-based IP string parsing with no heap allocation, and the global ipsets (black_list_ipv4/ipv6) are only freed in free_acl(), never within this function. The property holds vacuously.
